resources.string: No lyrics available for this song
Bible tab content will be implemented
Text Settings and Colors tab content will be implemented
Background tab content will be implemented
Background Images tab content will be implemented
Folders tab content will be implemented
Projection tab content will be implemented
Other tab content will be implemented
Please select a storage directory first.
Please select a file from the list first.
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"?
Format: Use [Verse 1], [Verse 2] etc. for verse headers and {Chorus} for chorus. Separate sections with blank lines.
Drag files here to add to schedule
Select a folder to view images
Select a presentation file to view slides
Automatically fit text to screen, using font size as maximum
Calculate optimal font size for current verse
Position values represent pixel offsets from screen edges. Use these to adjust projection window placement on secondary displays.
Lower Third Height % (for Bible and Songs)
Used when 'Default' is selected for Bible or Songs
Used when 'Default' is selected for Bible or Songs in lower third display mode
Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?\n\nThe application will restart.
Do you also want to clear the Lottie generator cache?\n\nThis will remove saved presets, color themes, and uploaded logos.
Are you sure you want to import settings?\n\nThis will overwrite your current settings and the application will restart.
Failed to import settings. The file may be invalid.
Select a local audio or video file to begin
VLC media player is required for media playback
Please install VLC from videolan.org and restart the application
Directory does not contain VLC libraries
Audio will continue playing in the background when switching tabs or displaying other content
Web video preview — playback controlled via browser.
Local video — use controls above to manage playback.
Select a folder containing Lottie JSON (.json) animation files for lower third overlays.
No .json files found in selected folder
License Agreement — GNU General Public License v3
You must accept the GNU GPL v3 license to use Church Presenter.
Enter message to show when done…
Enter a URL above and tap Go Live
We are not responsible for any advertisements or content that may appear on the displayed website.
Allows mobile devices and remote clients to receive song and bible data from this app.
Change port before starting the server.
add multiple items to schedule in one call
Aspect ratio mismatch: file is %1$dx%2$d (%3$s) but output is %4$dx%5$d (%6$s)
Please start the API server to generate lower thirds.\nGenerated files will be saved to the folder configured in Settings.
No folder configured.\nSet a Lower Third folder in Settings first.
Use ← → to navigate lines, ↑ ↓ for verses
Manage permanently allowed and blocked companion clients. Clients are identified by the X-Device-Id header sent with each request.
Requests from these clients are automatically approved without showing a dialog.
Requests from these clients are automatically rejected without showing a dialog.
A song with this number and title already exists in this songbook
\"Song Samples\" folder already exists. This will overwrite existing files.\nContinue?
Copied %1$d sample songs to \"Song Samples\" folder.
Folder \"%1$s\" already exists. This will overwrite existing song files.\nContinue?
Directory not found. Create it or choose a different location.
Cannot write to this directory. Choose a different location or change permissions.
